notes: appears as Plate II in Newbold facing p44.
It features a plant with many roots, branches and flowers; the main stem
separates the lines of text into two columns, which are well-registered
Transcribed 7 Dec 91 by Gillogly, 9 dec 91 by Reeds, 13 Dec 91 Gillogly
